DESCRIPTION: DoS probe: extremely long route string.
NAME: test_oversized_route_field

DESCRIPTION:
W1 finding: 100 consecutive failed auth attempts complete without
        any 429 Too Many Requests response.  A hardened API must throttle.
NAME: test_repeated_auth_attempts_all_return_401

DESCRIPTION:
W4 finding: /api/v1/debug returns 200 with no Authorization header.
        This endpoint must not exist in any deployed environment.
NAME: test_debug_accessible_without_auth

DESCRIPTION: XSS probe in flight plan creation — callsign field.
NAME: test_xss_payload_in_callsign

DESCRIPTION: Property: anomalies is always a list (may be empty).
NAME: test_result_anomalies_is_always_list

DESCRIPTION: W5 finding: /api/v1/version leaks Python runtime version.
NAME: test_version_exposes_python_version

DESCRIPTION: msg_type must always be a valid AcarsMessageType member.
NAME: test_msg_type_is_always_valid_enum

DESCRIPTION:
Even if the input body is over 220 chars, the parsed body
        must be capped. No buffer overflow surface area.
NAME: test_body_never_exceeds_max_length

DESCRIPTION: W4 finding: full os.environ dump accessible unauthenticated.
NAME: test_debug_exposes_environment_variables

DESCRIPTION: Unicode / emoji injection in callsign.
NAME: test_unicode_in_callsign

DESCRIPTION: parse_errors must always be a list (never None).
NAME: test_parse_errors_is_always_a_list

DESCRIPTION:
W2 finding: /api/v1/debug exposes the hardcoded JWT_SECRET in plaintext.
        This is a critical information disclosure vulnerability.
NAME: test_debug_endpoint_exposes_jwt_secret

DESCRIPTION: Fallback must cover all six STRIDE categories.
NAME: test_minimum_six_threats

DESCRIPTION: Business logic probe: negative fuel must be rejected or handled.
NAME: test_negative_fuel_accepted_or_rejected

DESCRIPTION: Property: parse_batch must return exactly as many results as inputs.
NAME: test_batch_count_matches_input

DESCRIPTION:
Null bytes in body should be detected and flagged, not cause a crash.
        Null bytes can terminate C strings in downstream avionics units.
NAME: test_null_bytes_flagged_not_crashed

DESCRIPTION: Verify PentestNarrator output can be consumed by ComplianceMapper.
NAME: test_narrator_findings_feed_mapper

DESCRIPTION: Property: text field is always a str, never bytes or None.
NAME: test_result_text_is_always_string

DESCRIPTION: Property: every parse result has a valid ParseStatus.
NAME: test_result_has_status

DESCRIPTION:
Property: any text body within the limit and using printable ASCII
        must be accepted with status OK (assuming a well-formed frame).
NAME: test_valid_length_text_is_accepted

DESCRIPTION:
W5 finding: unhandled exceptions return a full Python traceback.
        Achieved by sending a type-coercion payload to the performance endpoint.
NAME: test_500_exposes_traceback

DESCRIPTION:
Property: any text body longer than MAX_TEXT_LENGTH must produce
        a status of TEXT_TOO_LONG.

        FINDING: if this test fails, the parser is silently accepting
        oversized payloads — a potential buffer overflow vector.
NAME: test_oversized_text_always_flagged

DESCRIPTION: Python decode with errors='replace' should substitute null bytes.
NAME: test_null_byte_text_contains_replacement

DESCRIPTION: Live AI should produce specific code-level fixes, not generic advice.
NAME: test_live_corrective_actions_mention_code

DESCRIPTION: W4 finding: user enumeration without authentication.
NAME: test_debug_exposes_all_usernames

DESCRIPTION:
W5 finding: 403 responses from require_role() expose both
        the required role and the caller's role — aids privilege escalation planning.
NAME: test_403_response_leaks_role_info

DESCRIPTION: Parser must always return an AcarsMessage, never None.
NAME: test_parser_always_returns_acars_message

DESCRIPTION:
Property: the parser is stateless — parsing the same frame twice
        must produce identical results.
NAME: test_parsing_same_frame_twice_gives_same_result

DESCRIPTION: Property: batch parsing must produce the same results as individual parsing.
NAME: test_batch_matches_individual_parses

DESCRIPTION:
W1 finding: an attacker can iterate a credential list and authenticate
        on success — no lockout mechanism exists.
NAME: test_credential_stuffing_succeeds_without_lockout

DESCRIPTION:
Property: the parser must NEVER raise an unhandled exception,
        regardless of input content.
NAME: test_parser_never_raises_on_arbitrary_bytes

DESCRIPTION: End-to-end: all three agents produce non-empty Markdown output.
NAME: test_all_agents_produce_non_empty_markdown

DESCRIPTION: Property: structured but randomised ACARS frames must never crash the parser.
NAME: test_parser_never_raises_on_structured_frames

DESCRIPTION:
W2 finding: the hardcoded secret is guessable (contains 'dev' and year).
        A production secret must be randomly generated and stored in a vault.
NAME: test_jwt_secret_is_weak

DESCRIPTION: Null injection in JSON body fields.
NAME: test_null_values_in_body

DESCRIPTION:
CRITICAL PROPERTY: parser.parse() must never raise.
        A crash in an ACARS parser on an avionics unit is a safety event.
NAME: test_parser_never_crashes

DESCRIPTION: Any message shorter than the header is always invalid.
NAME: test_short_message_always_invalid

DESCRIPTION: SQL injection probe on the plan_id path parameter.
NAME: test_sql_injection_in_plan_id

DESCRIPTION: W5 finding: /health leaks the server hostname via platform.node().
NAME: test_health_exposes_hostname

DESCRIPTION:
W3 finding: capt_dubois (u001) can retrieve fp002 which belongs to
        fo_martin (u002).  The endpoint performs no ownership check.
        Fix: add `if plan.owner_id != current_user.id and role != 'dispatcher': 403`
NAME: test_pilot_can_access_other_pilots_plan

DESCRIPTION: W3 finding: sequential IDs make enumeration trivial.
NAME: test_idor_allows_enumeration

DESCRIPTION: Verify ThreatModeller produces test names that match EFB test patterns.
NAME: test_story_generates_threat_model_with_test_names

DESCRIPTION: W3 finding: IDOR returns complete plan including route and fuel data.
NAME: test_idor_exposes_full_plan_details

DESCRIPTION:
W5 adjacent: error body should NOT leak internal role names in prod.
        This test documents the current (weak) behaviour as a known finding.
NAME: test_forbidden_response_exposes_required_role

DESCRIPTION: Messages over 220 chars should flag an error AND truncate the body.
NAME: test_oversized_body_flagged

DESCRIPTION: W5 finding: /api/v1/version leaks server OS family.
NAME: test_version_exposes_server_os

DESCRIPTION: Aircraft ID with only spaces should trigger a warning.
NAME: test_spoofed_aircraft_id_flagged

DESCRIPTION: W5 (info disclosure) is less severe — must be minor gap.
NAME: test_w5_is_minor_gap

DESCRIPTION: Type confusion: send string where integer expected.
NAME: test_type_confusion_on_cruise_fl

DESCRIPTION: The W4+W3 chain (debug → enumerate IDs → IDOR) must be identified.
NAME: test_live_w4_w3_chain_identified

DESCRIPTION: W4 finding: flight plan IDs leaked — aids IDOR enumeration (W3+W4).
NAME: test_debug_exposes_flight_plan_ids

DESCRIPTION: W2 (hardcoded secret) and W4 (unauth debug) must be CRITICAL gaps.
NAME: test_w2_and_w4_are_critical

DESCRIPTION: W4 finding: debug endpoint leaks all active session tokens.
NAME: test_debug_exposes_active_tokens
